title: OlymMATH
description: Evolve the editable solver independently for each OlymMATH en-hard test question in the local answer-available dataset split.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns 0 when it cannot solve the active OlymMATH question.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher exact-match rate is better across independently evolved OlymMATH question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the final answer string for the current OlymMATH question. Return plain integers when possible; otherwise return a standard mathematical expression, preferably in LaTeX form. Do not use browsing or external network access.
